# UC-11.2.23 · SharePoint Online DLP Policy Matches (Office 365 DLP Feed)

## Description

DLP events scoped to SharePoint or OneDrive workloads show policy violations where sensitive labels, PII, or IP leave structured collaboration repositories.

## Value

Bridges email-centric DLP monitoring into modern file collaboration, helping teams respond before synchronized clients spread violations broadly.

## Implementation

Confirm `Workload` and `Severity` fields exist in your DLP feed; some tenants require `spath` on JSON payloads. Map `PolicyName` to data-classification registers. Route critical severities to the same queue as endpoint DLP alerts.

## SPL

```spl
index=o365 sourcetype="ms:o365:dlp" earliest=-24h
| eval wl=lower(coalesce(Workload, workload, ""))
| where match(wl, "sharepoint|onedrive")
| eval policy=coalesce(PolicyName, policyName, Workload, "unknown")
| eval actor=coalesce(UserId, UserPrincipalName, userId, "")
| stats count by policy, actor, Severity
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Bar chart (policy × severity), table (actor × policy), timeline.

## References

- [Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Office 365](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4055)
- [Learn about data loss prevention](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/compliance/dlp-learn-about-dlp)
